title: OGTpa
description: Adds an easy way for players to teleport to each other!
body:
![Adds an easy way for players to teleport to each other!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d6f658b9fbdca9eb941ad1a1019bdda0b35f6b3.png)

/tpa - **[Send a teleport request]**

/tpaccept - **[Accept a teleport request]**

/tpatoggle - **[Disable or enable teleport requests]**

/tpahere - **[Send a teleport here request]**

/tpahereaccept - **[Accept a teleport here request]**

/back - **[Go back to your previous location]**

                **ADD CUSTOM GUI TPA MENU**
